title: ISI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Research Engineer Posts
description: The Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Linked Research Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electrical, Computer Science Engineering, M.Sc., MCA, Ph.D. can apply for the ISI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview....
